response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a technically competent individual contributor with genuine distributed-systems and full-stack depth, but falls decisively short of the CTO profile the role demands. There is no evidence of engineering leadership at any scope — no people management, no team scaling, no organizational ownership, and no executive or board-level communication across a 16-year career. His agentic AI exposure is limited to developer tooling started in April 2025 at Naver, which is far removed from the production multi-agent financial systems the role requires. Fintech exposure is shallow (investment tooling at RIDE Capital), with no credit infrastructure, working-capital systems, or regulatory compliance experience anywhere on the resume.
strengths: Real distributed-systems depth demonstrated at Sociomantic — microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency async I/O is directly relevant to the real-time inference and streaming requirements
Emerging agentic AI awareness — current Naver role involves MCP framework development and agentic workflow tooling, showing active engagement with the space
Broad polyglot and platform experience — 16+ years across embedded, mobile, web, and data engineering signals solid architectural intuition across system boundaries
concerns: Zero engineering leadership experience — no people management, no team scaling, no organizational design at any point in the career; role requires scaling a team from 10 to 30+ and developing a senior technical leadership layer

No production multi-agent AI in high-stakes environments — agentic work is limited to developer tooling and began April 2025; role requires demonstrated production deployment with financial consequences and auditability requirements

No fintech infrastructure depth — no credit systems, working-capital allocation, real-time risk modeling, payment flows, embedded finance, or multi-jurisdiction regulatory compliance anywhere in the history

key_factors.factor: Absence of engineering leadership and people management
No production multi-agent AI at commercial scale
Distributed systems and high-throughput backend experience
